imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Space galaxy background with multiple floating smartphones and USB cables, a large central smartphone displaying a blue gift box with phones bursting out, bold white text 'FREE PHONES DAILY!', two blue CTA buttons labeled 'BROWSE MODELS' and 'ENTER GIVEAWAYS', a blue winged dollar-sign app icon in the top-left corner of the phone screen, and 'PHONESTORM' branding in white at the bottom with a sparkle icon (phonestorm-banner.dim_1024x1024.png)

existing_features.title: Create a full-stack personal dashboard app with an ideas/notes board where users can create, view, edit, and delete short notes or idea cards. Each card should have a title, body text, and a timestamp.

Design and apply a bold, energetic visual theme with a dark background, vibrant warm accent colors (e.g., amber/orange/coral), clean sans-serif typography, and card-based layout with smooth hover interactions. Enforce this theme consistently across all pages and components.
Generate and render a custom app logo/icon for the dashboard header as a static asset.

Render the provided PhoneStorm promotional image as a static asset in the dashboard. Display it as a banner or featured card section within the existing dashboard layout, consistent with the established dark/warm-accent visual theme.
